popularStory.headline: Introduction
popularStory.description:
Henry VII was born at Pembroke Castle on 28 January 1457 to Margaret Beaufort, Countess of Richmond. His father, Edmund Tudor, 1st Earl of Richmond, died three months before his birth.[4]

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry VII King of England於1457年1月28日出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可 卡素時，他的父親Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond26歲，母親Margaret Beaufort13歲。他於1486年1月18日與Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1485年登記服兵役。他在英國蘇格蘭被列為baillie of kilmarnock。他去世於1509年4月21日在英國素瑞里士滿享年52歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry VII King of England于1457年1月28日出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可 卡素时，他的父亲Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond26岁，母亲Margaret Beaufort13岁。他于1486年1月18日与Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1485年登记服兵役。他在英国苏格兰被列为baillie of kilmarnock。他去世于1509年4月21日在英国素瑞里士滿享年52岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Henry VII King of England was born on 28 January 1457, in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Beaufort, was 13. He married Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England on 18 January 1486, in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1485. His occupation is listed as baillie of kilmarnock in Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 21 April 1509, in Richmond, Surrey, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry VII King of England est né le 28 janvier 1457, à Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Beaufort, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England le 18 janvier 1486, à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1485. Sa profession de son indiquée est baillie of kilmarnock à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 21 avril 1509, à Richmond, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry VII King of England am 28. Januar 1457 in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Beaufort 13. Er hat am 18. Januar 1486 in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1485 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als baillie of kilmarnock in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. April 1509 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Richmond, Surrey, England und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry VII King of England è nato il il 28 gennaio 1457 nel Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Beaufort, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England il 18 gennaio 1486, nel Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1485. La sua occupazione è indicata come baillie of kilmarnock nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 21 aprile 1509, nel Richmond, Surrey, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry VII King of Englandが1457年1月28日にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロク カストルで生まれた時，父Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmondは26歳，母Margaret Beaufortは13歳であった。1486年1月18日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーでElizabeth of York Queen Consort of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年に兵役登録をした。イギリススコットランドでの職業はbaillie of kilmarnockと記録されている。彼は1509年4月21日にイギリススリーリチモンドで52歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Henry VII King of England(이)가 1457년 1월 28일 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Beaufort(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1486년 1월 18일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에서 Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 baillie of kilmarnock이었다. 그는 1509년 4월 21일 영국 수리 리ch몽에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry VII King of England nasceu em 28 de janeiro de 1457, em Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Beaufort, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England em 18 de janeiro de 1486, em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1485. Sua profissão aparece como baillie of kilmarnock em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 21 de abril de 1509, em Richmond, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry VII King of England родился 28 января 1457 г. в местности пемброк кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Beaufort, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England 18 января 1486 г. в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1485 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии baillie of kilmarnock в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 21 апреля 1509 г. в местности ричмонд, сурри, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry VII King of England nació el 28 de enero de 1457, en Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Beaufort, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England el 18 de enero de 1486, en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1485. Su ocupación registrada era baillie of kilmarnock en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 21 de abril de 1509, en Richmond, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
